name: Kinetic Text Path Follow
description: Manual-wiring template: kinetic text whose position follows a deterministic circular path driven by two LFO CHOPs (sine X, sine Y at 0.25 phase = cosine). LFOs lfox/lfoy are created but NOT auto-bound to transform1.tx/ty because RecipeSchema parameters only accept constant `value`s, not expressions. After import: set transform1.tx to expression `op('lfox')['chan1']*<path_radius_x>` and transform1.ty to `op('lfoy')['chan1']*<path_radius_y>`. The exposed `path_speed` only retunes lfox.frequency; manually mirror it on lfoy.frequency (or expose path_speed_y) for synced speed. Placeholder for a future native path-follow extension (Sample CHOP over Curve SOP). Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check in TouchDesigner.

nodes.name: lfox
nodes.comment: Componente X do path circular (cos via fase)

nodes.name: transform1
nodes.comment: Segue o path: tx/ty bindados aos LFOs via expressao

parameters.name: path_speed
parameters.label: Path Speed X (Hz)
parameters.description: Angular speed of lfox only — mirror onto path_speed_y (or lfoy.frequency directly) for a synced circular path.

parameters.name: path_speed_y
parameters.label: Path Speed Y (Hz)
parameters.description: Angular speed of lfoy. Match path_speed for a true circle; offset for a Lissajous figure.

preview_description: The word 'TDMCP' gliding along a smooth invisible circular path. Placeholder until a native path-follow extension (Sample CHOP over Curve SOP) ships.
